message:
🐛 Fix navigate-away test timeouts and sidebar discovery for real backend (#1112)

- Add 5min test timeout override for REAL_BACKEND mode (25 dashboards with
  some taking 30s+ means 60s global timeout is insufficient)
- Scroll sidebar links into view before checking visibility — long sidebars
  have links below the fold that Playwright considers not visible
- Add page recovery: if sidebar links disappear after a slow/crashed dashboard
  navigation, reload the page and retry before skipping

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
